allow: Bash(python -c "import postgrest, inspect, os; from postgrest._sync.request_builder import SyncSelectRequestBuilder as B; print\(inspect.signature\(B.order\)\)")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cs=d.get\('collections',[]\); print\('collection count:',len\(cs\)\); [print\(' ',c['handle'],'|',c['title'],'| products:',c.get\('products_count'\)\) for c in cs]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['products']; print\('page1 count:',len\(p\)\); v=p[0]['variants'][0]; print\('sample price:',repr\(v['price']\),'| sku:',repr\(v['sku']\),'| available:',v['available'],'| compare_at:',repr\(v.get\('compare_at_price'\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['items'][0]; print\('  ',d['raw_name'][:50],'| shop:',d['shop']['name'],'| \\$',d['price_usd'],'| img:',\(d['image_url'] or ''\)[:35]\)")
Bash(python -c "from supabase.lib.client_options import ClientOptions; import dataclasses; print\([f.name for f in dataclasses.fields\(ClientOptions\) if 'timeout' in f.name]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d['total']\); [print\(f\\"  \\${i['price_usd']:>7}  {i['category_slug']:<11} {i['raw_name'][:50]}\\"\) for i in d['items']]")

Bash(python -c "from scraper.shops import pcandparts, macrotronics; from scraper import scope, cleanup_scope; from scraper.scope import apply_scope; print\('imports OK'\); print\('coupler ->', apply_scope\('networking','RJ45 LAN Extension adapter'\)\); print\('router  ->', apply_scope\('networking','TPLink Cat6 AC1200 Gigabit Router'\)\); print\('NIC     ->', apply_scope\('networking','NICGIGA 10Gb Network Card PCIe Dual RJ45 Port'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from scraper.shops import pcandparts, macrotronics; from scraper.scope import apply_scope; print\('scraper imports OK'\); print\('coupler ->', apply_scope\('networking','RJ45 LAN Extension adapter'\)\); print\('patch   ->', apply_scope\('networking','Prolink Patch Cord UTP CAT6 1Meter'\)\); print\('router  ->', apply_scope\('networking','TPLink Cat6 AC1200 Gigabit Router'\)\); print\('NIC     ->', apply_scope\('networking','NICGIGA 10Gb Network Card PCIe Dual RJ45 Port'\)\); print\('cpu     ->', apply_scope\('cpu','AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('  total in-scope listings:', sum\(c['count'] for c in d\)\); [print\(f\\"  {c['slug']:<14}{c['count']}\\"\) for c in d]")
